selection: 按 4–7 岁 阅读者的常用词频与中小学词汇标记筛选

words.translation: n. 花园, 果园, 菜园；vi. 栽培花木
words.definition: n. a plot of ground where plants are cultivated

words.translation: n. 男人, 家伙
n. 书, 书籍, 帐簿, 名册, 工作簿；v. 登记, 预订
words.definition: n. a written work or composition that has been published (printed on pages bound together)

words.translation: n. 一点点, 少许, 一会儿, 短时间；a. 小的, 很少的, 幼小的, 琐碎的, 短暂的, 矮小的
words.definition: n. a small amount or duration

words.translation: n. 无, 不关紧要之事, 零；adv. 毫不, 决不
words.definition: n. a quantity of no importance

words.translation: n. 父亲, 祖先, 长辈, 神父, 创始者；vt. 当...的父亲, 保护, 创作, 发明, 培养
words.definition: n. a male parent (also used as a term of address to your father)

words.translation: n. 绿色, 绿色颜料；a. 绿色的, 未成熟的, 新鲜的, 青春的, 无经验的, 脸色发青的
words.definition: n. green color or pigment; resembling the color of growing grass

words.translation: adv. 相当, 完全, 十分
words.definition: r. to a degree (not used with a negative)

words.translation: n. 记录, 履历, 档案, 审判记录, 最高纪录, 唱片；vt. 记录, 记载, 标明, 将...录音
words.definition: n. anything (such as a document or a phonograph record or a photograph) providing permanent evidence of or information about past events

words.translation: prep. 直到, 在...以前, 迄；conj. 直到...为止
words.definition: n. unstratified soil deposited by a glacier; consists of sand and clay and gravel and boulders mixed together

words.translation: n. 晚餐, 正餐, 宴会
words.definition: n. the main meal of the day served in the evening or at midday

words.translation: n. 记忆, 记忆力, 回忆, 纪念, 存储；n. 内存
words.definition: n. something that is remembered

words.translation: n. 笔记, 记录, 注解, 票据, 符号, 显要, 注重, 便笺, 照会；vt. 记录, 注解, 注意
words.definition: n. a brief written record

words.translation: n. 图画, 照片, 景色, 美丽如画的人(或物), 化身, 生动的描述, 想像, 形象思维；vt. 画, 拍摄, 用图说明, 描写, 想像
words.definition: n. a visual representation (of an object or scene or person or abstraction) produced on a surface

words.translation: n. 雨, 下雨, 雨天；vi. 下雨
words.definition: n. water falling in drops from vapor condensed in the atmosphere

words.translation: n. 带子, 录音带, 磁带, 窄带, 卷尺；vt. 以带子绑起, 测量, 录音
words.definition: n. a long thin piece of cloth or paper as used for binding or fastening

words.translation: n. 带子, 线, 鞋带, 领带, 领结, 关系, 束缚, 平局, 不分胜负；vt. 系, 打结, 扎, 约束, 与...成平局
words.definition: n. equality of score in a contest

words.translation: n. 穿着, 戴, 使用, 耗损, 服装, 耐久性；vt. 穿着, 戴, 留(须、发等), 呈现, 磨损, 磨成, 耗损, 使疲乏, 消磨
words.definition: n. impairment resulting from long use

words.translation: n. 木材, 木制品；vt. 植林于, 给...添加木柴
words.definition: n. the hard fibrous lignified substance under the bark of trees

words.translation: a. 更远的, 此外的, 更多的；vt. 促进, 增进, 助长
words.definition: s. more distant in especially degree

words.translation: a. 害怕的, 恐怕的, 遗憾的
words.definition: a. filled with fear or apprehension

words.translation: prep. 在旁边
words.definition: n. At the side of; on one side of.

words.translation: interj. 再会, 回头见
words.definition: n. you advance to the next round in a tournament without playing an opponent

words.translation: n. 猫, 恶妇；vi. 呕吐
words.definition: n. feline mammal usually having thick soft fur and no ability to roar: domestic cats; wildcats

words.translation: vt. 挖, 翻土, 发掘；vi. 挖掘
words.definition: v. turn up, loosen, or remove earth

words.translation: a. 好笑的, 有趣的, 滑稽的；n. 滑稽人物
words.definition: s. experiencing odd bodily sensations

words.translation: n. 帽子；vt. 给...戴帽子
words.definition: n. headdress that protects the head from bad weather; has shaped crown and usually a brim

words.translation: n. 环, 环形物, 拳击场, 戒指, 角逐, 小集团, 铃声, 钟声, 声调；vt. 包围, 套住, 按铃, 敲钟
words.definition: n. a characteristic sound

words.translation: n. 日落, 同伙, 组合, 集合, 装置；vt. 放, 安置, 放置, 设定, 使凝结, 点燃, 确定, 点缀, 使就位, 树立, 分配, 调整
words.definition: n. a group of things of the same kind that belong together and are so used

words.translation: n. 黄色；a. 黄色的
words.definition: n. yellow color or pigment; the chromatic color resembling the hue of sunflowers or ripe lemons

words.translation: n. 收集, 采集, (一批)收藏品, 募捐
words.definition: n. several things grouped together or considered as a whole

words.translation: n. 版本, 版, 翻版
words.definition: n. the form in which a text (especially a printed book) is published

words.translation: n. 档案, 公文箱, 文件夹, 文件, 卷宗, 锉刀；vi. 列队行进, 用锉刀做
words.definition: n. a set of related records (either written or electronic) kept together

words.translation: n. 尺寸, 量度器, 量度标准, 测量, 量具, 程度, 范围, 限度, 分寸, 措施, 方法；vt. 测量, 测度, 估量, 权衡, 调节, 拿(自己或自己的力量等)作较量
words.definition: n. any maneuver made as part of progress toward a goal

words.translation: a. 最初的, 原始的, 有创意的；n. 原物, 原作
words.definition: s. preceding all others in time or being as first made or performed

words.translation: n. 计划, 设计, 事业；vt. 计划, 设计, 投掷, 发射, 使凸出, 放映
words.definition: n. a planned undertaking

words.translation: n. 一种描述, 版本, 译文
words.definition: n. an interpretation of a matter from a particular viewpoint

words.translation: a. 金的, 含金的, 金色的, 贵重的, 繁盛的
words.definition: s. marked by peace and prosperity

words.translation: n. 发烧, 发热, 热病
words.definition: n. a rise in the temperature of the body; frequently a symptom of infection

words.translation: a. 长的, 长久的, 冗长的, 做多头的；vi. 渴望, 热望, 极想
words.definition: a. primarily temporal sense; being or indicating a relatively great or greater than average duration or passage of time or a duration as specified

words.translation: n. 老鼠, 胆小羞怯的人, 鼠标；vi. 捕鼠, 窥探
words.definition: n. any of numerous small rodents typically resembling diminutive rats having pointed snouts and small ears on elongated bodies with slender usually hairless tai

words.translation: n. 猪, 猪肉, 贪婪的人, 猪一样的人；v. 生小猪, 象猪般地生活
words.definition: n. a crude block of metal (lead or iron) poured from a smelting furnace

words.translation: n. 排, 行, 街道, 划船, 吵闹；vt. 使成排, 划, 划船, 参加(赛船), 痛骂
words.definition: n. an arrangement of objects or people side by side in a line

words.translation: n. 咽喉, 喉咙, 嗓音；vt. 用喉音说, 开沟于
words.definition: n. the passage to the stomach and lungs; in the front part of the neck below the chin and above the collarbone

words.translation: prep. 关于
words.definition: v be relevant to

words.translation: n. 故事, 谎言, 谣言, 陈述, 叙述
n. 拇指；vt. 以拇指拨弄, 笨拙地摆弄, 用拇指翻旧, 迅速翻阅, 作搭车手势
words.definition: n. the thick short innermost digit of the forelimb

words.translation: n. 托儿所, 苗圃, 温床
words.definition: n. a child's room for a baby

words.translation: n. 熊；vt. 忍受, 支承, 产生, 怀有, 通过卖空使跌价
words.definition: n. massive plantigrade carnivorous or omnivorous mammals with long shaggy coats and strong claws

words.translation: n. 象
words.definition: n. five-toed pachyderm

words.translation: n. 狮子, 狮子(星)座, 国际狮子会会员
words.definition: n. large gregarious predatory feline of Africa and India having a tawny coat with a shaggy mane in the male

words.translation: n. 鼠, 卑鄙的人, 破坏者, 变节者；vi. 捕鼠, 变节
words.definition: n. any of various long-tailed rodents similar to but larger than a mouse

words.translation: n. 鲸；vi. 捕鲸
words.definition: n. any of the larger cetacean mammals having a streamlined body and breathing through a blowhole on the head

words.translation: a. 不恰当的, 无关系的, 不相干的
words.definition: a. having no bearing on or connection with the subject at issue

words.translation: a. 人工制成的, 成功的, 创造的；make的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. produced by a manufacturing process; rope and nails"

words.translation: n. 猫头鹰
words.definition: n. nocturnal bird of prey with hawk-like beak and claws and large head with front-facing eyes

words.translation: build的过去式和过去分词
words.definition: s. (used of soaps or cleaning agents) having a substance (an abrasive or filler) added to increase effectiveness

words.translation: a. 拔出的；draw的过去分词
words.definition: s. having the curtains or draperies closed or pulled shut

words.translation: n. 安德鲁（男子名）
words.definition: n. (New Testament) disciple of Jesus; brother of Peter; patron saint of Scotland

words.translation: n. 例证, 插图
words.definition: n. artwork that helps make something clear or attractive

words.translation: n. 雄性动物, 雄猫
words.definition: n. male cat
